hero.tagline: Your Lost Items Deserve to Come Home
hero.description: A secure digital platform for lost & found item management with ownership verification. Built for young adults who demand clarity, trust, and precision in every interaction.

lost.title: Lost & Confused
lost.desc: Losing valuable items is stressful. You don't know where to look or who to trust with your belongings.

noVerification.title: No Verification
noVerification.desc: How do you know the person claiming your item is really the owner? Traditional methods lack security.

noConnection.title: No Connection
noConnection.desc: Lost and found items scattered across social media and bulletin boards. No centralized, trustworthy place.

centralized.title: Centralized Platform
centralized.desc: One secure place for all lost and found items in your community.

verification.title: Verified Ownership
verification.desc: Secret questions ensure only the real owner can claim items.

trust.title: Trust Score System
trust.desc: Build your reputation through successful claims and verified transactions.

communication.title: Secure Communication
communication.desc: Direct messaging between owners and claimants for coordination.

steps.title: Report
steps.desc: Post your lost or found item with details, photos, and a secret question.

steps.title: Verify
steps.desc: Claimants answer your secret question. Only the real owner will know the answer.

steps.title: Reunite
steps.desc: Accept the verified claim and coordinate item return. Build your trust score.

items.title: Report Lost Items
items.desc: Quickly report any misplaced valuable with precise details, location data, and photos.

items.title: Verify Ownership
items.desc: Our secure verification system ensures items are only returned to their rightful owners.

items.title: Claim Discovery
items.desc: Seamlessly browse found items and initiate secure claim requests within seconds.

trustSystem.title: Build Your Reputation
trustSystem.description: Your trust score reflects your reliability and integrity on Lqitha. It grows with every successful claim and verified transaction.

points.claim_desc: When your claim is accepted by the owner
points.resolved_desc: When you return a found item to its owner
points.perks_desc: Unlock badges, priority visibility, and community recognition

cta.title: Find Your Lost Items Today
cta.description: Join thousands of users who have successfully recovered their belongings through Lqitha. Whether you're looking for something you lost or want to help others find theirs, we're here to help.

fields.title: Title
fields.titlePlaceholder: A brief identifier for your item (e.g., 'Black Wallet with Silver Zipper')

fields.locationPlaceholder: Where was the item lost or found? Be as specific as possible.

securityProtocol.title: Security Protocol
securityProtocol.description: To ensure your item is returned to the rightful owner, we use a secret question system. Only the person who knows the correct answer can claim the item.
securityProtocol.questionPlaceholder: Define a question that helps others identify if they have found your specific item.
securityProtocol.verificationPlaceholder: Define a specific verification question. The claimant must answer this correctly before contact is permitted.
securityProtocol.answerPlaceholder: The answer to your secret question
securityProtocol.questionExample: 'What color is the charm attached?' or 'What was the lock combination?'
securityProtocol.verificationExample: 'What is the sticker on the back?' or 'What is the unique scuff mark?'
securityProtocol.secretQuestionPlaceholder: e.g., What is the unique mark on the back?

new.requiredFieldsDescription: All fields marked with {asterisk} must be completed. You cannot proceed to the next step without filling all required fields.
new.note: Note: Contact information remains encrypted until verification is complete.

settings.paragraph2: If you're experiencing issues or have concerns, please contact our support team at lqitha.platform@gmail.com before proceeding. We're here to help and may be able to resolve your issues without needing to delete your account.

notFound.subtitle: This Item Appears to Be Lost
notFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist. Just like a lost item, we'll help you find your way back.

sections.title: 1. Information We Collect
sections.content: We collect information you provide directly: name, email address, password (encrypted), phone number (for item listings), and profile picture. We also collect usage data such as items posted, claims made, and login timestamps.

sections.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
sections.content: Your information is used to: operate and improve the Lqitha platform, verify your identity during the claim process, send email notifications (verification, password reset), and compute your Trust Score based on platform activity.

sections.title: 3. Data Storage & Security
sections.content: Your data is stored in a secure PostgreSQL database hosted on Neon.tech. Passwords and secret answers are encrypted using bcrypt with 12 salt rounds. We use HTTPS for all data transmission. JWT tokens are stored in HTTP-only cookies.

sections.title: 4. Phone Number Privacy
sections.content: Your phone number is never displayed publicly. It is only revealed to a claimant after their ownership has been verified and their claim has been accepted by you.

sections.title: 5. Third-Party Services
sections.content: We use the following third-party services: Cloudinary for image storage, Stream Chat for real-time messaging, Google OAuth for social login, and Gmail for email delivery. Each service has its own privacy policy.

sections.title: 6. Data Retention
sections.content: We retain your data as long as your account is active. You may request deletion of your account and associated data by contacting us. Password reset and email verification tokens expire automatically (1 hour and 24 hours respectively).

sections.title: 7. Cookies
sections.content: We use HTTP-only cookies for session management. These cookies are essential for the platform to function and cannot be disabled. We do not use tracking or advertising cookies.

sections.title: 8. Your Rights
sections.content: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data. You may update your profile information and picture from your Dashboard at any time.

sections.title: 9. Children's Privacy
sections.content: Lqitha is not intended for users under the age of 18. We do not knowingly collect personal information from minors.

sections.title: 10. Contact Us
sections.content: For any privacy-related questions or data requests, please contact us at lqitha.platform@gmail.com.

sections.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
sections.content: By accessing and using Lqitha, you accept and agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our platform.

sections.title: 2. Use of the Platform
sections.content: Lqitha is a lost and found platform designed to help people recover their belongings. You agree to use the platform only for legitimate lost and found purposes. Any fraudulent claims or misuse of the verification system is strictly prohibited.

sections.title: 3. User Accounts
sections.content: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials. You must provide accurate information when registering. You are responsible for all activities that occur under your account.

sections.title: 4. Content & Listings
sections.content: You are solely responsible for the content you post on Lqitha. You must not post false, misleading, or fraudulent item listings. Lqitha reserves the right to remove any content that violates these terms.

sections.title: 5. Ownership Verification
sections.content: The secret question system is designed to verify ownership. Attempting to guess or brute-force secret answers is prohibited. Repeated failed attempts will result in automatic rejection of your claim.

sections.title: 6. Privacy
sections.content: Your personal information, including phone numbers, is kept private until ownership is verified. We do not sell your personal data to third parties. Please refer to our Privacy Policy for full details.

sections.title: 7. Trust Score
sections.content: The Trust Score system reflects your activity on the platform. Fraudulent behavior may result in score penalties. Lqitha reserves the right to suspend accounts with consistently low trust scores.

sections.title: 8. Limitation of Liability
sections.content: Lqitha provides a platform for connecting users but is not responsible for the actual recovery of items. We do not guarantee the accuracy of any listing or the identity of any user.

sections.title: 9. Changes to Terms
sections.content: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Continued use of the platform after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.

sections.title: 10. Contact
sections.content: For any questions regarding these terms, please contact us at lqitha.platform@gmail.com.

browse.title: Browse Items
browse.subtitle: Find what you lost or return what you found. Currently tracking

support.title: Support & Feedback
support.subtitle: We're here to help. Reach out with any questions, bug reports, or suggestions.
support.contactSubtitle: Send us a message and we'll get back to you within 24 hours.
support.feedbackSubtitle: Help us improve Lqitha with your suggestions.
support.messagePlaceholder: Describe your issue or suggestion in detail...
support.successDesc: Thank you for reaching out. We'll respond to your email within 24 hours.

faq.a: When posting an item, you set a secret question only the real owner would know. Claimants must answer correctly (up to 3 attempts). This ensures items are returned to their rightful owners.

faq.q: What happens after my claim is accepted?
faq.a: Once accepted, a private chat channel opens between you and the item owner to coordinate the return. Both parties' trust scores are updated upon successful completion.

faq.q: How is my phone number kept private?
faq.a: Your phone number is never shown publicly. It only becomes visible after a claim has been accepted and ownership verified.

The Trust Score reflects your reliability on the platform. It increases when you post items (+5), get a claim accepted (+10), or resolve an item (+15). Failed system-rejected claims reduce it by 10 points.
Yes. Go to Settings → Danger Zone and type DELETE to confirm. All your data will be permanently removed from our servers.

faq.q: What if I forgot my password?
faq.a: Click 'Forgot password?' on the login page. We'll send a reset link to your registered email, valid for 1 hour.
